channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: How about that?! Danielle Collins has a back-and-forth with a booing Australian Open crowd
item.description: Danielle Collins has gotten into a back-and-forth with a booing crowd at the Australian Open after eliminating a local player.
item.dc:creator: Howard Fendrich, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Why the Australian Open is streaming live tennis with gaming-style player avatars
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Maybe attending sports events in person is too been-there, done-that in the modern age. So, apparently, is watching the actual action on a TV, laptop or phone.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Iga Swiatek moves into a 3rd-round match against Emma Raducanu at the Australian Open
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Iga Swiatek rushed through the first set in 26 minutes and completed her 6-0, 6-2 second-round win over Rebecca Sramkova in an hour at the Australian Open. The five-time Grand Slam champion makes a habit of advancing quickly through the early rounds at the majors.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Former Indiana basketball players say team doctor sexually abused them with unnecessary prostate exams
item.description: Three former members of the Indiana men's basketball team have filed a lawsuit against the school, claiming their doctor at the time sexually abused them.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Paris Olympic medals to be replaced after several athletes complain of tarnishing
item.description: A French mint is replacing medals from the 2024 Paris Olympics after several athletes have complained that they have already begun to deteriorate.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Iowa State's 30-year streak of hitting a 3-pointer ends in win over Texas Tech
item.description: Iowa State's NCAA record streak of 945 consecutive games with a 3-pointer ended Tuesday night in a 71-58 victory over Texas Tech. The Cyclones had made a 3-pointer in every game dating back to Feb. 19, 1995, at Colorado when the school was still part of the Big Eight.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Montreal skates past Utah Hockey Club, 5-3
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Hockey Club's season-long 7-game homestand is not going well. Utah lose for the third time in four games at the Delta Center, falling to the Montreal Canadians Tuesday night, 5-3.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Beck hopes to bring big play ability to Utes offense
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - When Kyle Whittingham called former BYU quarterback Jason Beck about becoming the Utes new offensive coordinator, Beck jumped at the chance. "When I hit that time of year and had some opportunities come up, and and Coach Witt came calling," Beck said Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: House Republicans pass bill to ban transgender athletes from girls’ sports
item.description: House Republicans passed a bill Tuesday to bar transgender student-athletes from competing in girls’ sports, putting the contentious issue front and center following an election cycle that saw it become a frequent target of Republicans.
item.dc:creator: Brooke Migdon, NewsNation

item.title: Pelletier scores twice as the Flames cruise to 5-2 win over the Blackhawks
item.description: Jakob Pelletier had two goals and an assist, helping the Calgary Flames beat the Chicago Blackhawks 5-2 on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Jayden Daniels leads Commanders to first playoff win in nearly 7,000 days, 23-20 over the Buccaneers
item.description:
New owners. New general manager. New coach. New franchise quarterback.
That’s the formula — with an emphasis on the QB — that Washington rode to playoff success after nearly two decades of futility.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Lamar Jackson and Josh Allen will face off for a berth in the AFC championship game
item.description: Lamar Jackson vs. Josh Allen won’t decide the NFL MVP next week. The stakes are higher with a spot in the AFC championship game on the line.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Bronco's season comes to an end following 31-7 loss to Buffalo
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—The Denver Broncos’ long-awaited playoff return ended Sunday in Upstate New York. After eight years away from the postseason, the Broncos found themselves in the spotlight, led by rookie quarterback Bo Nix.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: New England Patriots hire former Super Bowl champ Mike Vrabel as next coach
item.description: Vrabel, a fan favorite during eight seasons as a player in New England where he was a member of its first three Super Bowl winners and an inductee into the team’s Hall of Fame in 2023, was the preferred candidate because of his long association with the franchise and coaching success.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Ezra Ausar scores 21 as Utah earns first Big 12 victory
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Ezra Ausar scored a season-high 21 points in just 17 minutes of action. as the Utah basketball team won its first Big 12 Conference game Saturday, beating Oklahoma State, 83-62.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Ohio State getting shot at 6th national title after 28-14 win over Texas in CFP semi Cotton Bowl
item.description: ARLINGTON, Texas (AP) — Jack Sawyer had the kind of moment that will live on long past his playing days with Ohio State. Of course, one more victory would make it that much sweeter.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN HAWKINS, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Blue Jays add All-Star reliever Jeff Hoffman with $33 million, 3-year contract
item.description: All-Star reliever Jeff Hoffman and the Toronto Blue Jays have agreed to a $33 million, three-year contract.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Notre Dame secures spot in the CFP National Championship after win over Penn State
item.description: Notre Dame has secured a spot in the College Football Playoff National Championship game after defeating Penn State 27-24 in the Orange Bowl on Thursday night. This is a breaking news update, the original story can be found below. No. 3 Notre Dame (13-1, CFP No. 7 seed) vs. No.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Las Vegas Raider Charles Snowden thought he was in Florida during DUI arrest: Video
item.description: Tests showed Snowden’s blood-alcohol level was more than double the legal limit after officers found him asleep and unresponsive in a running SUV, documents show.
item.dc:creator: David Charns, NewsNation
